nameJP: 焔の拳僧 ニッコー
effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, all of your front row units get [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: A dawn upon the world. That is the prayer of "Red Dawn Manor".

nameJP: 焔の巫女 パラマ
effectEN: [CONT](GC):If your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Rino! Even if it's tough, it's no reason to cry and whine!

nameJP: 焔の巫女 ローナ
effectEN: (You may only have up to four [Heal] triggers in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn! Then, if the number of cards in your damage zone is equal to or more than your opponent's, choose a card from your damage zone, and heal it!)
flavorTextEN: The prayers of the "Blaze Maidens" overflows with the light of hope.

nameJP: 焔の巫女 ゾンネ
effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, choose one of your units, and it gets [Critical]+1 until end of turn! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: "Red Dawn Manor" has been the holy land of prayers since the era of myths.

nameEN: Blaze Staff Monk, Cho Kuu Sha
nameJP: 焔の杖僧 チョクーシャ
effectEN: (When revealed as a trigger, draw a card! Then, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+10000 until end of turn!)
flavorTextEN: As the prayers reached the heavens, the era without prayers approached its end.
Gathering electricity within itself, it prepares to strike its resented foe.

nameEN: Double Gun of Dust Storm, Bart
nameJP: 砂塵の双銃 バート
effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.

(You may only have one [Over] trigger in a deck. When revealed as a trigger, remove that card, draw a card, choose one of your units, and it gets [Power]+100 Million until end of turn! If revealed during drive check, activate its additional effect!)
Additional Effect - Choose one of your vanguards, and [Stand] it!
flavorTextEN:
Stand up.
Never giving up is the way to open the path forward.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is rode upon, if you went second, draw a card.

effectEN:
[CONT]:Sentinel (You may only have up to four cards with "[CONT]:Sentinel" in a deck.)

If you rode, you cannot ride by card effects until end of turn.

effectEN:
[CONT]:When this card would be discarded for the cost of your vanguard with "Overlord" in its card name's ability, it may be regarded as discarding two cards.

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if your (VC) has two or more Arms, this unit gets [Power]+5000.

nameEN: Beautiful Bullet of Dust Storm, Jodie

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Cries of triumph run through the earth like lightning.

nameJP: 壊れたオモチャ
effectEN:
Play this if you have a vanguard with "Tamayura" in its card name!
Look at the top seven cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "Ririmi" in its card name and up to one card with "Rarami" in its card name from among them or your drop, put them into your soul, and shuffle your deck. If your soul has one or more cards each with "Ririmi" in its card name and with "Rarami" in its card name, draw a card. (You can choose one card each from among the looked cards and from your drop)
flavorTextEN: I'll be with you……until the end.

flavorTextEN: What remains is the will to counterattack.

effectEN: [CONT](RC):During your turn, if your opponent's vanguard is grade 3 or greater, this unit gets [Power]+5000.
flavorTextEN: The perfect opponent! I'll respond with all of my wind!

effectEN:
[CONT]:This card cannot be ridden, and cannot be normal called to (RC) from hand.
[AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Soul Blast (1)], and call this card to a back row (RC).
flavorTextEN: Skill is a given. Though finding the motivation can be difficult!

effectEN:
[CONT](RC):During your turn, if you have a vanguard with "Youthberk" in its card name, this unit gets [Power]+2000.
[AUTO](RC):When your unit is placed on (VC) by the [RevolDress] ability, COST  [put this unit into soul], choose one of your vanguards, and increase or decrease its drive to 1 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: Power and will overlap. In such a way that it will not waver.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted a vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name, if that battle's drive check did not reveal a grade 3 card, COST  [Counter Blast (1) & retire this unit],  choose one of your rear-guards, and [Stand] it.
flavorTextEN: There's no way that I'd fail at such a crucial moment!

effectEN:
Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)]!
Look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card with "RevolForm" in its card name from among them and reveal it and put it into your hand, or choose up to one grade 2 or less card from among them and call it to (RC). Shuffle your deck.
flavorTextEN: The determination to destroy the skies grows larger, as more like minded allies gather around the black knight.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, COST  [Counter Blast (1)], look at the top three cards of your deck, and put them on the top of your deck in any order.
flavorTextEN: I've got the flow started! Now let's teach them a lesson!

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this card is discarded from hand during your ride phase, you may call this card to (RC).
flavorTextEN: We can't leave it to the people from the skies to maintain order on the ground.

effectEN: [ACT](RC):If you have a grade 3 or greater vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, COST  [retire this unit], choose a [Critical] trigger or [Front] trigger from your drop, and put it into your hand.
flavorTextEN: A spin, glitter and some fluffiness. A great transformation of me!

effectEN: [CONT](GC):If you have a vanguard with "Sorceress" in its card name, this unit gets [Shield]+10000.
flavorTextEN: Evil beings that squirm in the darkness. They shall be banished with blessings from the crescent moon.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC), if your soul has a grade 3 card, COST  [put a grade 3 card from your hand into your soul], draw a card, and this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
flavorTextEN: In the glory of the highest sky, not a single stain is allowed.

effectEN: [AUTO](RC):When this unit boosts, if your vanguard is grade 3 or greater, you may Soul Charge (1).
flavorTextEN: It's super effective. You'll need a little courage to drink it though.

effectEN: [AUTO]When this card is discarded from hand during your turn, if your vanguard is [Glitter], COST  [Counter Blast (1)], and draw a card.
flavorTextEN: Hope is always within grasp.

effectEN:
[AUTO](RC):At the end of the battle this unit boosted, if you have a vanguard with "Minerva" in its card name, return this unit to your hand.
[AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have grade 3 or greater "Regalia" in its card name in your soul, during that battle, this unit gets [Shield]+5000.
flavorTextEN: Note the documents. The primordial wisdom has saved us from predicaments countless times.

effectEN:

flavorTextEN: The magic of the soul of languages that rocks the heart across generations.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is put on (GC), if you have a vanguard with "Bastion" in its card name, choose any number of your grade 3 or greater rear-guards, move them to (GC), and all of the moved units get [Shield]+5000 until end of that battle.

effectEN: [AUTO]:When this unit is placed on (RC) from hand, COST  [Counter Blast (1)] look at the top five cards of your deck, choose up to one card from among them without the same card name as a card in your soul, put it into your soul, and shuffle your deck.

If you put a card into your hand, this unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

"Cardinals" change their appearance to match the quirks of their "coffin".

Skill-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Skill is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 80 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

•Super Finishing Attack is "Dangun" - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Then, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & discard a "Super Dangun" from hand], and retire all of your opponent's rear-guards.

Move-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Move is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 80 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Finishing Move is Pinching - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Super Finishing Move is "Kingfisher Hug" - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn. Then, COST  [Counter Blast (2) & discard a "Super Kingfisher Hug" from hand], and all of your opponent's vanguards cannot [Stand] during their next stand phase.

Move-[AUTO](Order Zone):When this Move is used, perform all of the following according to the attacking unit.
•Technique is 80 or greater - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.
•Finishing Move is Throwing - That attacking unit gets [Power]+5000 until end of turn.

If this unit got [Power]+10000 or greater by this effect, at the end of that battle, COST  [bind this unit], and Counter Charge (1)/Soul Charge (1).

Play this with COST  [Counter Blast (1)] if you have a vanguard with "Lianorn" in its card name!
